Veterans Benefits: Washington has no state individual income tax, so military retirement income is not taxed as wage or pension income; qualifying seniors, people retired due to disability, and veterans compensated at the 80% service-connected rate may qualify for income-based property-tax exemptions or deferrals.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 Spokane scorecard + MAP Washington Equality Profile 2026
Description: Spokane is an inland Northwest regional city with a local VA medical center, major hospital access, riverfront parks, nearby hiking and skiing, and comparatively moderate Washington housing costs. It pairs no state income tax with a high local sales tax and above-average violent-crime rate, while county-level presidential returns remain modestly Republican despite a Democratic shift since 2016.
